# John Doe

Barcelona, Spain | john.doe@email.com | +34 612 345 678 | linkedin.com/in/johndoe

## Summary
Experienced ML Engineer with 8+ years building production ML systems.

## Experience

### Senior ML Engineer
TechCorp, Barcelona
Jan 2020 - Present
- Led team of 5 engineers building recommendation systems
- Reduced model inference latency by 40%
- Deployed 10+ models to production serving 1M+ users

### ML Engineer
DataCo, Madrid
Mar 2016 - Dec 2019
- Built NLP models for text classification
- Implemented MLOps pipelines using Kubernetes
- Trained 20+ engineers on ML best practices

## Education

### MSc Computer Science
Universitat Politècnica de Catalunya, 2016

### BSc Mathematics
Universidad Complutense de Madrid, 2014

## Skills
- Python, PyTorch, TensorFlow
- AWS, GCP, Kubernetes
- MLOps, Docker, CI/CD
- Team leadership, Agile

# Notable Projects

## Recommendation Engine (2023)
- Built real-time recommendation system handling 10K requests/second
- Used collaborative filtering + deep learning hybrid approach
- Increased user engagement by 25%

## GenAI Chatbot (2024)
- Developed internal chatbot using LLMs
- Integrated with company knowledge base
- Reduced support tickets by 30%

## ML Platform (2022)
- Led development of internal ML platform
- Reduced model deployment time from 2 weeks to 2 days
- Adopted by 15 teams across the organization
